urdu transliteration text:
Introductory Note:
Imtehaane-e-Hussain
english translation text: The poet imagines the conversation between God and the Angel of Death at the time of Imam Hussain's death.

urdu transliteration text: Haay, Khuda ne jab malakul maut ko yeh izn diya
english translation text: Woe! When the Lord permitted the Angel of Death

urdu transliteration text: Ke roohe hazrate sarwar nikaal kar le aa
english translation text: That: Go! Bring me the soul of the noble Sarwar (Hussain)

urdu transliteration text: Rahe khayal ke shabbir ko na ho iza
english translation text: But be careful! Let Shabbir not feel any pain

urdu transliteration text:
Hussain (3) pehle hi zakhmo se choor choor hua
For Hussain is already writhing with deep wounds
Malak pukara yeh mujse na ho sakega khuda
english translation text: The angel called out: "I will not be able to carry out this (order) my Lord

urdu transliteration text: Main kis tarah se nikaloon badan se jaane Hussain
english translation text: How am I to lift the soul of Hussain from his body?

urdu transliteration text: Arey Bohut hi sakht hai yaarab yeh imtehaane Hussain
english translation text: Verily, O Lord, this Trial of Hussain is excruciating.

urdu transliteration text: Haay, laga hai zakhme tabar beh raha hai sar se lahoo
english translation text: Woe! He has been struck by the sword; blood flows from the head

urdu transliteration text: Bhare hain khoon mein jaane rasool ke gesu
english translation text: The hair of the beloved of the Prophet is covered in blood

urdu transliteration text: Qareeb jaake rakhein dil pe kis tarah kaabu
english translation text: How can I go near him; and yet control my pulsating heart?

urdu transliteration text: ke is lahoo mein to hai Fatima ke dhoodh ki boo
english translation text: For in this blood can I smell the fragrance of Fatima (sa)

urdu transliteration text: Haay na phir in ankhon pe dhaaoon sitam yeh kya hai zaroor
english translation text: Woe! How can I bear to inflict more pain on these eyes?

urdu transliteration text: KYUN LEKE CHALA TALWAARON MEIN BABA KO MERE KYA YEI HEI WAFA
english translation text: O why do you take my father to the swords?

urdu transliteration text:
Bhichad ke lo ali akbar se hogayi be noor
Which, having lost Ali Akbar, have also lost their sight
Nida yeh aayi dahan se nikaal jaane huzoor
english translation text: Came the Voice: Lift the soul of the noble man (Hussain) from his blessed mouth

urdu transliteration text: kaha dahan mein to kaante padhe hai rabbe ghafoor
english translation text: He said: But there are thorns in the mouth, O my Forgiving Lord

urdu transliteration text: Nida yeh aayi ke gardan se khainch jaan inki
english translation text: Came the Voice: Pull his soul from the neck then

urdu transliteration text: kaha main kya kahoon gardan pe chal rahi hai churi
english translation text: He said: What can I say! The neck is being slashed by the dagger!

urdu transliteration text: Churi pakad ke yeh chillathi hai koi bibi
english translation text: And a Lady clutches the blade, screaming

urdu transliteration text: Na zibha kar mere bache ko main dua doongi
english translation text: Do not slaughter my child! I will surely pray for you

urdu transliteration text: Haay, Nida yeh aayi ke seene se khabz kar le jaan
english translation text: Woe! Came the Voice: Go, and grasp the life from his chest

urdu transliteration text: Kaha woh teero se chalni hai ay mere rehman
english translation text: He said: But that has been fully pierced with arrows, Oh Merciful One

urdu transliteration text: Abhi to maar ke barchi hata tha ek shaitaan
english translation text: And just now did a devil walk away having struck it with a spear

urdu transliteration text: Aur ab tho hai tahe zaano-e-shimr yeh qur-aan
english translation text: And presently, this Quraan (i.e. Hussain's chest) is under the knees of Shimr (la)

urdu transliteration text: Haay, Nida yeh aayi ke mazloomiyath ke ruthba shanas
english translation text: Woe! Came the Voice: O you who recognizes the dignity of the Mazlum

urdu transliteration text: Kamar se khainch le Shabbir ki jaan be was waas
english translation text: Go then! and from the spine seize the soul of Shabbir; and do not hesitate

urdu transliteration text: kaha malak ne tadap kar badal do hasratho yaas
english translation text: Cried the shivering Angel: Alter Your divine wish

urdu transliteration text: kamar to toot gayi jab se mar gaye Abbas
english translation text: For his back was shattered with the death of Abbas

urdu transliteration text: Falak se tab hua roohul ameen ka inme nuzool
english translation text: From the lofty skies then, the Trusted Lord, revealed unto the Angel

urdu transliteration text: Kaha pukaar ke moo dhaanp lo baraaye batool
english translation text: Said He: Cover your face (O Angel) for the sake of Batool (i.e. Fatima)

urdu transliteration text: pisar ki laash pe kholengi baal binte rasool
english translation text: For at the corpse of her son the Prophet's daughter will grieve

urdu transliteration text: sada yeh thi malakul mauth ki ba huzno malool
english translation text: Then this is what the Angel of Death said replete with grief and sadness

urdu transliteration text: Haay, mili hai hukm hoon par fikr yeh hai ay yazdaan
english translation text: Woe! I have Your Command, O Great One! But yet am I agonized

urdu transliteration text: har ek juzv hai zakhmi lagaoon haath kahaan
english translation text: That every patch of the body is wounded; wherefore can I place my hand?

urdu transliteration text: khuda pukara yeh mushkil karenge hum aasan
english translation text: Then God called out: We shall ease this difficulty

urdu transliteration text: na tu nikaal mere aashiqe ghareeb ki jaan
english translation text: You do not seize the soul of my poor lover

urdu transliteration text: main khud nikal raha hoon badan se jaane hussain
english translation text: I am Myself taking from the body, the soul of Hussain

urdu transliteration text: yeh khatm hone ko ab hai, yeh imtehaane hussain
english translation text: For culminates now, this Trial of Hussain
